title: Implement real SPI/libloragw backend for Sx1302Concentrator
description: Replace no-op stub in lichen-hal/src/lib.rs Sx1302Concentrator impl with actual SPI communication or FFI to libloragw (per research in chw5/s3d6). Support reset, configure_channels, packet RX. Add build deps if needed. Ensure no_std compatibility where possible.
